meaning: n.荒野,茫茫一片,大量,荒地
examples: This area has been christened 'Britain's last wilderness'.
The Wilderness Society lobbied Congress to authorize the Endangered Species Act.
Wilderness designation prohibits road building, the use of mechanized equipment and most other developments.
But the fact she survived four days in the wilderness was cause for celebration.
Even the more tormented parts of the world are beginning to experience the egalitarian beauty of public wilderness.
